payload.title: Need first-class contained Project Site bootstrap
payload.summary: Setting up Narada inside /home/andrey/src/smart-scheduling showed that Narada has useful contained Site bootstrap machinery, but it is currently client-specific and non-git oriented. Project repositories need a first-class contained Project Site bootstrap path.
evidence: The desired setup was not a separate repo: Narada governance should live inside the existing smart-scheduling repo under .narada. The closest command, narada sites bootstrap-client --workspace /home/andrey/src/smart-scheduling --site-id smart-scheduling --sync local_non_git --execute, correctly created .narada containment, inbox-drop, inbox-envelopes, and governance folders. But it generated site_kind client_service, authority_locus client_service, sync posture local_non_git, and guidance saying not to initialize Git. That is wrong for smart-scheduling, which is an existing Git-backed project repo at https://github.com/global-maxima/smart-scheduling. We corrected the local Site to site_kind project and sync posture git_backed_project_repo. The available doctor command is also client-specific and failed for the corrected project Site, while surfacing only Command failed; code inspection showed it expects site_kind client_service.
proposal: Add first-class project-contained Site bootstrap support. Possible surface: narada sites bootstrap-project --workspace <project-repo> --site-id <id> --sync git_backed_project_repo. Alternative: generalize contained bootstrap to --kind project|client_service|data|elt and include sync postures for existing Git-backed project repos. The generated config, README, AGENTS, doctor, and validation commands should preserve project-locus language: the Site owns project-local governance, construction memory, inbox intake, observations, decisions, tasks, chapters, KB, and requests; it does not own Narada proper doctrine, User Site memory, PC recovery authority, or external capabilities. The doctor should validate project Site shape directly and should report specific failing checks instead of only Command failed.
payload.recommendation: Treat this as a product/tooling ergonomics task for Site bootstrap. Acceptance should include bootstrap-project or generalized contained bootstrap, project git-backed sync posture, project-aware doctor validation, specific doctor failure output, and a migration note that current smart-scheduling .narada was bootstrapped through client machinery then corrected locally.
